message.content:
Want AI news? I can help, just tell me what you’d like. A few quick options:

- Real-time briefing: paste links or sources (e.g., TechCrunch, NYTimes, company blogs) and I’ll summarize the latest headlines.
- Quick trends digest: 5–7 key AI themes right now (policy/regulation, safety, enterprise AI, chips, ethics, consumer apps, startups).
- Topic deep-dive: focus on regulation, safety and governance, AI in healthcare, or AI in business.
- Company moves: track strategies from OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Meta, Apple, etc.
- Event previews: upcoming conferences and safety discussions.
- Custom cadence: daily or weekly AI news briefings.

Note: I can’t browse live news on my own in this chat unless you provide sources or enable a browsing flow. Tell me your preferred topics, time window (today, this week, this month), and format (short bullets or a short article), and I’ll tailor a briefing.
